text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
Besides... Hello, do you know why<n>they started
doing winning concerts in<n>the first place?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Because runners wanted a chance to<n>express
their gratitude to fans after a<n>win, right?

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We get up on stage and<n>sing to thank
our fans for coming to<n>see us on our big day, for
supporting<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: But actually, the true origin story's a<n>little different.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
One runner spoke up and said she<n>wanted to sing.
That's how the<n>Grand Concert got started.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: She... wanted to sing? But why?

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: Well, because song brings us closer<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Closer together...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
This song was sung at the first Grand<n>Concert to
bring people closer<n>together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been asked by Light Hello to<n>think of lyrics
for a song, and, well...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Overheating detected. Should I pour<n>water on your
head?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
N-no, that's okay! My brain's just<n>fried from all
this lyric business—why<n>is it so haaard?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I knew a lot of artistry went<n>into lyrics, but
there's just so much<n>we have to think about at
once...
choice_data_list: You don't need to think so hard.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm...
choice_data_list:
How about listing the emotions you want to
convey?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The emotions...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: We want to convey...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell my fans that I've come<n>home to
them, and thank them for<n>waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student A
text_block_list.text:
I want them to look at me! I want to<n>scream, "Look
at me! Follow me!<n>Cheer only for me!"

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
And I want to tell them that I'm not<n>done yet! That
no matter how many<n>times I lose, I have a goal,
and I<n>won't give up on it no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
So until then, no matter what happens,<n>stay with
me—run with me! That's<n>what I want to say!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I... want to tell everybody that I am still<n>going
strong.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And I want to convey my gratitude to<n>all who look
forward to me reaching<n>my goals, without whom I
would not<n>be running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It would be the power to achieve a<n>breakthrough
for me, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, just how profound an<n>influence
concerts can have on<n>Umamusume is still an
unknown.<n>Which is all the more reason to have
high expectations!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I want to tell everyone... not just<n>"I'm
home," but also...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"I'm able to run only because you're<n>all here with
me."

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you all seem to be having fun.<n>How's it
coming along?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's good to hear. Trainer, about<n>the setlist for
the concert. I wanted to<n>get your opinion on—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, I want the lyrics to have a call<n>and response
part!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This might not have much to do with<n>conveying
emotions, but I think a<n>song with some back and
forth would<n>be nice...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Call and response... a section of a<n>song where the
singer and audience<n>shout in turn.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me... a fan mentioned<n>that getting to
sing together was one<n>of their favorite parts of a
concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's so true! I mean, if you<n>think about it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We'll never be able to run alongside<n>our fans, but
there's nothing to stop<n>us from singing together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we should propose the idea to<n>the others
right away.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's go see what everyone<n>thinks! We
have a bunch of new<n>members too!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
"We'll never be able to run alongside<n>our fans, but
there's nothing to stop<n>us from singing together!"

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That must be why the<n>Umamusume who first
created the<n>Grand Concert chose to sing.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Don't you see? She knew that song<n>brings us
closer together.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we may be in the final stretch,<n>but there's
lots more to do! We have<n>new people wanting to
join too!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Just one final push, and we'll make<n>this the best
concert it can be!
